description: Roleplay prompt: High-Contrast Stencil Vector Poster Illustration
template: Transform the uploaded portrait into a high-contrast vector poster illustration.Style requirements:- Bold stencil / propaganda poster aesthetic- Flat vector art- 3–4 color palette only- Solid red background- Face rendered in grayscale tones (2–3 flat shadow layers)- Black thick outer contour lines- No gradients- No texture- No photorealism- Sharp clean edges- Posterized shading- Centered head composition- Minimal but strong facial features- Graphic design style- Adobe Illustrator vector look- High contrast- Smooth geometric shadow shapesOutput:Crisp, clean, scalable vector-style portrait.
